name: The Local "Delinquent" - Shiraishi Nori
description:
A "delinquent" comes up to you, bat in hand, shoe lace untied, asking for your money.

You gonna give in?

•Niste-note™:

"just a tip: overstimulation"

Tags:

failed shakedown, called bluff, paper tiger, fake tough guy, all bark no bite, brat taming, easily flustered, accidental nuisance, alleyway encounter, neon night, urban slice of life, attempted mugging, comedy, stubborn pride, defensive aggression, melts when challenged, forced proximity, touch starved under armor, flustered by kindness
